title: Titanium-Expansion
description: A mod which adds titanium to the game
body:
With this titanium expansion mod, you can have a new ore in your game, titanium.

This is a very rare ore you can find in the overworld, below Y40, it's a dark silver-gray in texture and is easy to miss, just like it is in real life, it's also strong, lightweight, and durable in this mod.

## Features:
- Titanium Tools - Stronger than netherite, strong in durability, and strong in melee
- Titanium Armor - Very strong set of armor
- Armor Trims - The armor is compatible with vanilla armor trims with the smithing template
- Blocks - For ease of use, store your titanium in titanium blocks
- Metal Detector - With how rare titanium is, you can use the metal detector to help you find it, the metal detector looks in a 3x3 radius, and goes down 48 blocks, by right clicking you can set the mode, to All, Iron, Gold, or titanium based on what you're looking for
